rationale: In the citing paper, Griskevicius et al. (2009) appears only in a grouped citation list describing prior evolutionary consumer-behavior work that inspired the research stream. The paper does not discuss that article's specific fear/romantic-desire persuasion findings, and it does not use its mechanisms, measures, or results to build hypotheses or analyze outcomes. The core argument and tests are developed from ovulatory-cycle and intrasexual-competition literature instead, so this citation functions as broad background rather than a distinct intellectual dependency.
